name: Marcia's Brownie Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Melt the margarine and chocolate chips in a 3-quart saucepan, stirring constantly until fully melted.
3. Beat in the remaining ingredients until smooth; stir in the nuts if using.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased rectangular pan measuring 13" x 9" x 2".
5. Bake for about 30 minutes or until the center is set.
6. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting into bars.
7. This recipe makes approximately 36 brownies and is easy to make from scratch.
